subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Thou hast ever been, and art still, remembered in the presence of the Wronged One, and the glance of His loving-kindness is directed towards thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی لازال در ساحت مظلوم مذکور بوده و هستی لحاظ عنایت بتو
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
